name: LumaricSearch
author: Lumaric
description: Lumaric AI Search integration for plentyShop

containers.name: Lumaric Search Global Scripts
containers.description: Injects Lumaric config and client script on every page. Connect to: Ceres::Script.AfterScriptsLoaded

containers.name: Lumaric Search Result Items
containers.description: Injects Lumaric search result metadata for click tracking on the search results page. Connect to: Ceres::SearchPage.BeforeSearchFilters
